vocab.meaning: có tầm nhìn hướng ra (một khu vực rộng lớn)
vocab.example: There's a rooftop café in the city center that looks out over the entire harbor.

vocab.meaning: được ẩn mình, nằm ở nơi kín đáo/yên tĩnh
vocab.example: There is a hidden gem of a park tucked away behind the high-rise buildings that offers a serene lake view.

vocab.meaning: tận hưởng, đắm mình trong (không khí, cảnh đẹp)
vocab.example: I love heading to the cliffs at sunset to soak up the breathtaking scenery.

vocab.meaning: mãn nhãn, say sưa ngắm nhìn cái gì đó đẹp đẽ
vocab.example: If you hike to the summit, you can feast your eyes on the lush green valleys below.

vocab.meaning: nằm rải rác ở khắp nơi
vocab.example: There are several quaint little pagodas dotted around the mountainside that provide spectacular vantage points.

vocab.meaning: mở rộng tầm mắt (không gian trở nên rộng lớn hơn)
vocab.example: After walking through the dense forest, the path suddenly opens out onto a stunning panoramic view of the coastline.

vocab.meaning: trải dài ra xa tận chân trời
vocab.example: From my balcony, the golden rice fields seem to stretch away as far as the eye can see.
The local river is bordered by weeping willows, creating a very picturesque spot for a weekend stroll.

vocab.meaning: tình cờ tìm thấy (một cảnh đẹp)
vocab.example: While wandering through the old quarter, I stumbled upon a small balcony with a magnificent view of the cathedral.
Fortunately, there are no skyscrapers to block out the mountain views in this part of the city.
